# Data Layer Snapshot (auto-generated by main.py)

This file is rewritten every time `main.py` runs; do not edit by hand.
For project-level instructions, see the repo root `README.md`.

## Pipeline this run
1. **Acquire** - SEC EDGAR 10-K filings for AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, GOOGL, META, NVDA, BRK-B, JPM, BAC, TSLA (FY2023), or the bundled fallback.
2. **Clean** - Strip HTML/SGML, normalise whitespace, drop low-quality docs.
3. **Chunk** - Word-level overlapping chunks (500 words, 50 overlap).
4. **Embed** - all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-d), L2-normalised.
5. **Index** - FAISS IndexFlatIP (cosine similarity post-normalisation).
6. **Evaluate** - FinanceBench / FinDER (best-effort; may be skipped offline).

## Active corpus source
**sec_edgar** (a bundled fallback corpus is used automatically if SEC EDGAR
ingestion does not produce enough valid filings).
